command: ffs-cli mount --rw ; mutate; umount; remount; verify
notes: All 5 files plus subdir/nested.txt survived umount/remount with byte-exact content. The kernel's FUSE destroy hook triggers btrfs_full_transaction_commit which serializes the in-memory CoW fs_tree + root_tree, allocates real chunk-covered metadata logical addresses via BtrfsAllocState::alloc_metadata_for_tree, translates each to a physical offset via map_logical_to_physical, and patches the on-disk superblock in place (preserving dev_item, sys_chunk_array, label, backup-root-ring).
